title: Importing Instant Search into Angular 2 CLI
body:
**Do you want to request a *feature* or report a *bug*?**
BUG
<!--
  ***************************
  If the current behavior is a bug, please provide all the steps to reproduce and a minimal
  [JSFiddle](https://jsfiddle.net/) example or a repository on GitHub that we can `npm install`
  and `npm start`.
  https://github.com/KillionCorp/AngularAlgolia
also see the discussion here
https://discourse.algolia.com/t/instant-search-for-angular-2-cli-based-project/785/7


**Bug: What is the current behavior?**
Importing instantsearch.js causes errors that look like this:

ERROR in ./~/instantsearch.js/dist-es5-module/src/components/Template.js

**Bug: What is the expected behavior?**
correct import

**Bug: What browsers are impacted? Which versions?**
Chrome Version 56.0.2924.87 (64-bit)

**What project are you opening an issue for?**
- instantsearch.js

**What is the version you are using? Always use the latest one before opening a bug issue.**
"instantsearch.js": "^1.11.3",

my system info:

npm@4.3.0
